case_title: JASON TENE VS. RONNIE BIMBO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TENE, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT BIMBO, RONNIE NICHOLAS, TAMMY BIMBO, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO RONNIE BIMBO - 4384 MISSION;SF,CA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-04-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANTS DO NOT WAIVE SERVICE. (PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SUBPOENAS ARE NOT THE SAME AS PROOF OF SERVICE FOR CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF'S SERVER STATES HE FILED PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM 2 1/2 MONTHS AGO BUT DID NOT RECEIVE ENDORSED COPIES FROM THE CLERK) JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENE, JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIMBO, RONNIE NICHOLAS, TAMMY BIMBO, MICHAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
